inline_comments.message:
In order for resolutionSummary to work, please add inputKeymappings to resourceAssignment.keyIdentifiers

example: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ccsdk/cds.git;a=blob;f=ms/blueprintsprocessor/functions/resource-resolution/src/main/kotlin/org/onap/ccsdk/cds/blueprintsprocessor/functions/resource/resolution/processor/RestResourceResolutionProcessor.kt;h=5d9226876cb84b02884151f4e92184b8b99bb0d9;hb=refs/heads/master#l79

resolutionSummary also requires the generated payload to be added to

resourceSourceProperties["resolved-payload"]

example: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ccsdk/cds.git;a=blob;f=ms/blueprintsprocessor/functions/resource-resolution/src/main/kotlin/org/onap/ccsdk/cds/blueprintsprocessor/functions/resource/resolution/processor/RestResourceResolutionProcessor.kt;h=5d9226876cb84b02884151f4e92184b8b99bb0d9;hb=refs/heads/master#l86
